channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 8 Michigan State tops No. 17 Michigan 79-62, winning the 18-school Big Ten title by 3 games
item.description: Tre Holloman scored a career-high 20 points, Jase Richardson had 18 points and No. 8 Michigan State beat No. 17 Michigan 79-62.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bills release Von Miller in salary cap-saving move: Report
item.description: The move frees up at least $8.4 million in salary cap space, which comes close to matching how much the team was projected to be over the limit.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Buffalo Bills release NFL's active sacks leader Von Miller in a salary cap-saving move
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — The Buffalo Bills announced the long-anticipated decision to release Von Miller on Sunday, parting ways with the aging edge rusher whose contract proved too expensive for his dwindling playing time and production.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin sets World Cup podiums record with 3rd place in a slalom won by Katharina Truppe
item.description: ARE, Sweden (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin set an all-time World Cup record Sunday with her 156th podium finish though she let victory slip away in a slalom.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: In rivals’ fourth meeting, No. 1 St. Francis stamps itself as NorCal top dog with regional title win over No. 2 Mitty
item.description: The Lancers faced Archbishop Mitty for the fourth time this season, and they their third and biggest win over the Monarchs on a last-minute strike by Miliani Makasini to claim the CIF NorCal Division I title
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Warriors star Stephen Curry reaches 25,000 career points
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry became the 26th player in NBA history to score 25,000 career points, reaching the milestone during the third quarter of the Golden State Warriors' 115-110 victory over the Detroit Pistons on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andrew Tate, social media influencer who faces trafficking charges, sits cageside for UFC 313
item.description: Former kickboxer and controversial internet personality Andrew Tate was cageside for UFC 313 inside T-Mobile Arena, one night after attending Dana White’s Power Slap 12 at Fontainebleau Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Chiefs WR Xavier Worthy released after prosecutor declines charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Chiefs' Xavier Worthy avoids charges from arrest, district attorney says
item.description: Xavier Worthy has reportedly avoided charges from his arrest in Texas Friday night after Williamson County authorities spoke with witnesses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Barcelona's Spanish league game is postponed after death of team doctor
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Barcelona’s home game against Osasuna in the Spanish league was postponed on Saturday after the death of first-team doctor Carles Miñarro Garcia. Fans were informed of the decision around 15 minutes before the game was scheduled to kick off at 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes win another NCAA skiing national title
item.description: HANOVER, N.H. (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah returned to the pinnacle of the collegiate skiing world on Saturday as the Utes won their 17th national title all-time—and fifth in the last six seasons—with the conclusion of the 2025 NCAA Championships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ejiofor's buzzer-beater in OT gives No. 6 St. John's an 86-84 win over No. 20 Marquette
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Zuby Ejiofor hit a tiebreaking shot at the buzzer, Kadary Richmond got the first St. John’s triple-double this century and the sixth-ranked Red Storm beat No. 20 Marquette 86-84 in overtime Saturday for their sixth consecutive victory. St.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs agree to bring back wide receiver Hollywood Brown after Xavier Worthy's arrest: reports
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs are bringing back star wide receiver Hollywood Brown to one-year contract worth up to $11 million on Saturday, according to numerous reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Marco Rubio, other politicians played pivotal role in helping Bill Belichick land UNC job: report
item.description: Bill Belichick has friends in an important places, and according to one report, he called on now-Secretary of State Marco Rubio for help in landing the UNC head coaching job.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pickleball isn't named after a dog: How the sport really earned its moniker
item.description: You may have heard a rumor about the game being named after a dog. Spoiler alert: That isn't the case.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Kenwood girls and boys basketball squads looking to make school history together
item.description: The Kenwood Girls Basketball team defeated Alton 61-55 Friday afternoon at the IHSA Class 4A semifinal to advance to the school’s first state championship game.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Trump admin investigation finds Maine Dept. of Education violated Title IX
item.description: On Feb. 25, the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services sent a notice of violation against the Maine Department of Education.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Bay FC coaching staff facing investigation after complaints over head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Days after Bay FC unveiled renderings for its slick new training facility on Treasure Island, the team is facing more troubling allegations regarding its backroom staff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: White Sox reassign top 2 prospects to minor-league camp, team announces Thursday
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. — The White Sox reassigned two of their top prospects to minor-league camp, one a west suburban native, the team announced Thursday morning prior to its spring training game against the San Francisco Giants.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Special Olympics Illinois athletes head to Italy for snowshoe races
item.description: On Wednesday, a team of Special Olympics Illinois snowshoe athletes boarded a plane to New York, with a final destination of Turin, Italy. There they will compete in the Special Olympics Winter World Games.
item.dc:creator: Erin McElroy, NewsNation

item.title: Shorthanded Jazz lose to last place Wizards, 125-122
item.description: WASHINGTON, D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - Kyshawn George scored 23 points, Alex Sarr added 21 and the Washington Wizards edged the Utah Jazz 125-122 on Wednesday night in a battle of two last place teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Swimming is ready to chase their first National Championship
item.description: If there was ever a year for Colorado Mesa Swimming and Diving to bring home the program's first-ever national championship, this is the year.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 59, Fairmont Prep 55
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- 2025 CIF State Boys Basketball Championships Division I Carlsbad defeated Fairmont Prep 59-55. The visitors made the trek from Anaheim, and they could not slow down UCSD commit Jake Hall who hit for a game high 32 points for the Lancers.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Men charged in deaths of 3 Chiefs fans found dead in backyard
item.description: Ricky Johnson, 38; Clayton McGeeney, 36; and David Harrington, 37, were all found dead in their friend’s Kansas City backyard on January 9, 2024.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utes lose home finale to West Virginia, 71-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Senior Night did not go the way the Utes basketball hoped. Javon Small scored 18 points to help West Virginia beat its former coach Josh Eilert and Utah 71-69 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: There are about 118 pages in the scrapbook that contain various newspaper articles, box scores, summaries of baseball games and photographs of Jackson mounted to the pages.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Goalie of the future? Spencer Knight makes 41 saves, backstops Blackhawks to win over Kings in debut with team
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN, AP) — Spencer Knight was once considered the goaltender of the future for one NHL franchise. Now he plans to make a case as the goaltender of the future for another, and he got right to work with the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Senate to vote on bill banning trans athletes from women's sports
item.description: The legislation asserts under Title IX protections for female athletes that gender is “recognized based solely on a person’s reproductive biology and genetics at birth.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Luka scores 29 points and LeBron adds 17 in the Lakers' 2nd straight win over the Clippers, 108-102
item.description: Luka Doncic had 29 points and nine assists, LeBron James added 17 points and the Los Angeles Lakers hung on to beat the Los Angeles Clippers for the second time in three days, 108-102 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
